name: Leonard Wong
title: Software Engineer · AI & Agentic Development · LLM Applications
summary: Software Engineer specializing in AI and agentic development — building LLM-powered applications and agentic, tool-using workflows on a foundation of secure, data-driven platform delivery. AI Singapore LLM Application Developer; NUS-ISS Responsible & Explainable AI and AI + Cybersecurity.

ai_highlights.heading: AI & Agentic Highlights
items: Agentic development: designing LLM-driven, tool-using agent workflows with retrieval (RAG), function calling, and prompt engineering.
LLM application development through the AI Singapore LLM Application Developer Programme (2026).
Responsible & Explainable AI — NUS-ISS graduate certificates covering model transparency and governance.
AI + Cybersecurity — applying security rigor (SAST/DAST, OWASP) to AI-enabled systems (NUS-ISS, 2025).
